---
title: "Tom Stafford - CogSci @ Sheffield"
source: "https://tomstafford.sites.sheffield.ac.uk/news/cogsci-sheffield"
date: "2016-10-12"
---

# CogSci @ Sheffield 

[Back to News](/news)

12 October 2016

The mailing list [CogSci at Sheffield](https://groups.google.com/a/sheffield.ac.uk/forum/?hl=en-GB#!forum/cogsci) supports the ad hoc network of researchers at the University of Sheffield who are interested in cognitive science.

Sign yourself up and receive notifications about events happening across the University - mostly emanating from psychology, philosophy, linguistics and computer science.
